seo_title: Google DeepMind Partners with Republic of Korea to Accelerate…
meta_description: Google DeepMind announces partnership with Republic of Korea to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models.
body_html:
Google DeepMind has announced a partnership with the Republic of Korea to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models.

Key Partnerships and CollaborationsDeepening our partnership with the UK AI Security InstituteStrengthening our partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the AI eraSupporting U.S. Department of Energy on Genesis: a national mission to accelerate innovation and scientific discoveryAccelerating Discovery in Science and EducationCountryAi-powered science and education initiativesIndiaGoogle DeepMind supports AI-powered science and education initiativesKoreaAccelerating scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI modelsUKDeepening our partnership with the UK AI Security InstituteBenefits of the PartnershipAccelerate innovation and scientific discovery in the Republic of Korea

source.title: Announcing our partnership with the Republic of Korea
source.summary: Google DeepMind and Korea partner to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models
